details.test: Task 1: Pin most recent Acetone SDS to Lab A Favorites
Task 2: Create binder for flammable liquids with flash point < 25C
Task 3: Create SDS review list by expiry window
Task 4: Compare last two revisions and add PPE note
Task 5: Create product linked to SDS by CAS 67-63-0
Task 6: Add corrosive cleaning chemicals to quick access
Task 7: Create dashboard widget for Cat 1 carcinogens by building
Task 8: Assign top 3 NFPA health-rated items to emergency kit list
Task 9: Create secondary container label for high-pictogram inventory item
